scripts.prepare: npm install --prefix ../auth-activity-feeds/functions && npm install --prefix ../auth-chat/functions && npm install --prefix ../firestore-activity-feeds/functions
scripts.test: node scripts/prepare-extension-env.js && node scripts/validate-extension-env.js && npm run test-auth && npm run test-token-generation && npm run test-firestore
scripts.test-token-generation: node scripts/prepare-extension-env.js && firebase emulators:exec --only auth,functions --project demo-stream --config firebase.json --log-verbosity SILENT 'npx jest token-generation.test.ts --runInBand --detectOpenHandles --forceExit'
scripts.test-auth: npm run test-auth-chat && npm run test-auth-activity-feeds
scripts.test-auth-chat: node scripts/prepare-extension-env.js && firebase emulators:exec --only auth,functions --project demo-stream --config firebase.json --log-verbosity SILENT 'npx jest auth-chat.test.ts --runInBand --detectOpenHandles --forceExit'
scripts.test-auth-activity-feeds: node scripts/prepare-extension-env.js && firebase emulators:exec --only auth,functions --project demo-stream --config firebase.auth-activity-feeds.json --log-verbosity SILENT 'npx jest auth-activity-feeds.test.ts --runInBand --detectOpenHandles --forceExit'
scripts.test-firestore: node scripts/prepare-extension-env.js && firebase emulators:exec --only firestore,functions --project demo-stream --config firebase.firestore.json --log-verbosity SILENT 'npx jest firestore.test.ts --runInBand --detectOpenHandles --forceExit'
